title: Streets of Rogue 2

notes: Note that the demo is extremely unstable (dev himself admitted so), it ran like shit on Windows too, and there I had to wait around 15m for the world to finally load. Not blaming Proton in this case at all. Hopefully when they release the full version it won't be as messy as this.
title: Streets of Rogue 2
